title: Фильтры исключений: when без раскрутки стека

cards.prompt: Two catch clauses of the same type distinguished by exception filters; the first when (==fatal) is false, the second when (==retry) is true, so the retry-branch runs
cards.code: using System; string s; try { throw new InvalidOperationException("retry"); } catch (InvalidOperationException e) when (e.Message == "fatal") { s="fatal-branch"; } catch (InvalidOperationException e) when (e.Message == "retry") { s="retry-branch"; } Console.WriteLine(s);

cards.prompt: The when filter expression is evaluated before the stack is unwound and before the catch body: order is throw then filter then catch, printing throw;filter;catch;
cards.code: using System; string log=""; bool Filter(){ log+="filter;"; return true; } try { log+="throw;"; throw new Exception(); } catch when (Filter()) { log+="catch;"; } Console.WriteLine(log);

cards.prompt: The inner filter is false (message x != nomatch), so that catch does not handle the exception; since a false when filter does not swallow it, the exception continues to the outer catch, printing outer
cards.code: using System; string s; try { try { throw new InvalidOperationException("x"); } catch (Exception e) when (e.Message == "nomatch") { s="inner"; } } catch (Exception) { s="outer"; } Console.WriteLine(s);
